currentTask.name: 9Router complete: 5 structural upgrades + full integration + MCP exposure + 115 test suite
currentTask.goal: Complete comparative analysis of agentic-workflows vs 9Router. Implement 5 structural upgrades (gate plugins, dynamic autonomy, decision pipeline, cooldown/backoff, session dashboard). Wire all tools into commands, AGENTS.md, workflow.md. Integrate constitution auto-gating. Expose all gate infrastructure via MCP. Add smoke tests.

whatChanged: session-state.json populated with full session data (was bare template)
See prior sessions for the full change history across all 5 upgrades + integration work
verification: On main, 5 commits ahead of origin/main
keyLearnings: Session-state.json keeps getting overwritten to bare template on new session start (session-start.sh behavior). Fix by checking session-state.json first on resume and repopulating if empty.
Previous learnings from prior sessions are summarized in the HEAD commit series
residualRisk: 5 unpushed commits ahead of origin/main. The 3 pre-existing test failures appear resolved in intervening commits. Session-state.json bare-template issue persists across session resets.
immediateNextSteps: Consider: fix session-start.sh to preserve session-state.json across resets
Consider: HTTP wrapper mode for MCP server (non-stdio clients)
Consider: wire session-dashboard.sh into session-start hook
resumeRules: MCP: 61+ resources including gate://, state://dashboard, state://autonomy, methodology://gate-plugins
MCP pipeline: pipeline/run with transition + task params
Error cooldown: error-counter.sh with exponential backoff
doNotRepeat: Session-state.json gets overwritten on every session reset — always check and repopulate before compacting
